list.name: drift_strategy
list.label: Strategy
list.query: SELECT strategy_name AS __text, strategy_name AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_execution_costs) strategies ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT strategy_name AS __text, strategy_name AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_execution_costs) strategies ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(slippage_drift_bps) AS "Slippage Drift"
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(fill_quality_delta_bps) AS "Fill Quality Decay"
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(drift_score) AS "Drift Score"
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(total_cost_bps) AS "Total Cost"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(edge_after_cost_bps) AS "Edge After Cost"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(impact_bps) AS "Impact"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(adverse_selection_bps) AS "Adverse Selection"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(latency_drift_ms) AS "Latency Drift"
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(COALESCE(submit_to_fill_ms, submit_to_ack_ms)) AS "Submit->Fill"
FROM strategy_latency_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(funding_drift_bps) AS "Funding Drift"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(basis_drift_bps) AS "Basis Drift"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(fee_tier_adjustment_bps) AS "Fee Tier Adj"
FROM strategy_execution_costs
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(live_edge_bps) AS "Live Edge"
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', observed_at) AS "time", AVG(backtest_edge_bps) AS "Backtest Edge"
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT d.observed_at,
       d.strategy_name,
       d.symbol,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.live_edge_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS live_edge_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.backtest_edge_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS backtest_edge_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.fill_quality_delta_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS fill_quality_decay_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.slippage_drift_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS slippage_drift_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.latency_drift_ms, 0)::numeric, 1) AS latency_drift_ms,
       ROUND(COALESCE(c.total_cost_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_cost_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(c.edge_after_cost_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS edge_after_cost_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(c.funding_drift_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS funding_drift_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(c.basis_drift_bps, 0)::numeric, 2) AS basis_drift_bps,
       ROUND(COALESCE(d.drift_score, 0)::numeric, 2) AS drift_score,
       d.metadata ->> 'executionMode' AS execution_mode,
       d.metadata ->> 'status' AS status
FROM strategy_live_backtest_drift d
LEFT JOIN strategy_execution_costs c
  ON c.strategy_name = d.strategy_name
 AND c.symbol = d.symbol
 AND c.observed_at = d.observed_at
WHERE d.strategy_name = '${drift_strategy}'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.observed_at)
ORDER BY d.observed_at DESC
LIMIT 100
